exercises.title: Inspect the critical path
exercises.description: Open DevTools and identify which requests block first render on a page.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can point to parser-blocking scripts and render-blocking CSS.

exercises.title: Observe storage usage
exercises.description: Inspect cookies, localStorage, and cache storage for a site.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see what the browser stored and where it lives.

exercises.title: Measure layout cost
exercises.description: Change a layout-heavy property versus a transform and compare repaint behavior.
exercises.expected_outcome: Transform changes are cheaper than repeated layout invalidations.

exercises.title: Build a service worker cache
exercises.description: Add a service worker that caches static assets and serves them offline.
exercises.expected_outcome: The app continues to load after the network is disabled.

exercises.title: Profile a slow page
exercises.description: Instrument a page and identify the main bottleneck on the performance timeline.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can explain the dominant render or script bottleneck.

exercises.title: Implement a tiny SPA cache
exercises.description: Write a small app that preloads assets, caches them, and serves stale content while revalidating.
exercises.expected_outcome: The app loads quickly on repeat visits and updates in the background.
